text: The city exhales after dark, its streets slick with reflected neon and the amber wash of streetlights. A few figures move through the quiet blocks, their footsteps swallowed by the low hum of traffic somewhere in the distance. Office towers stand half-lit against the sky, windows scattered with the glow of those who stayed late, while below, a corner diner pours warmth onto the sidewalk and the smell of coffee drifts out into the cool air.
